email.subject: Post-storm roof check — 1101 Madison St
email.body:
The severe thunderstorm that hit Hudson County last week brought 60 mph winds and penny-size hail — exactly what stresses flashings, seams, and membranes on older roofs. At 1101 Madison St, a 1962 building with no documented roof work in decades, hidden damage from that event could be accelerating deterioration.

email.subject: My read on 1101 Madison St, Hoboken
email.body:
A 1962 building with no documented roof work on record — and 60+ years of Hudson County weather — tells me your roof is either past service life or very close. Winter wind exposure and coastal surge risk make timing critical before it becomes urgent.

Tell me I'm wrong. If you've had a real condition report in the last two years, I'll step back.
